title: OpenRouter Launches New Technology to Significantly Reduce the Cost of AI Multi-turn Conversations!
excerpt: Amid the continuous advancement of AI conversation technology, OpenRouter has recently introduced two innovative technologies—Prompt Caching and Sticky Routing—
content_html:
Amid the continuous advancement of AI conversation technology, OpenRouter has recently introduced two innovative technologies—Prompt Caching and Sticky Routing—aimed at significantly reducing the token costs of multi-turn agent conversations. The launch of this new technology means that developers can enjoy lower costs when engaging in long-term interactions with agents, thereby promoting the adoption of agent applications.

In multi-turn conversations, agents often need to repeatedly send the same system prompt, tool definitions, and strategy instructions. This leads to repeated charges even if the user changes the input only once during a six-round session. With Prompt Caching, OpenRouter can read from the cache to avoid high costs for repeated prompts. Depending on the service provider, the cost of cache reads is 0.1 to 0.5 times the normal input price, greatly reducing expenses. On the Claude Sonnet4.6 model, the cache read price is only $0.30 per million tokens, while the normal input price is $3.00.

To ensure this mechanism remains effective in multi-turn conversations, OpenRouter's Sticky Routing technology directs subsequent requests to the same provider that holds the hot cache, allowing developers to continue benefiting from low-cost cache reads across different conversation rounds.

However, to fully utilize this innovative technology, developers must ensure they maintain the same session throughout the process. For cache effectiveness, OpenRouter recommends users set a session_id, which can immediately enable Sticky Routing after the first successful request, not just after a cache hit. Additionally, developers can easily check whether the cache is working by reviewing the usage data in the request response.

As AI technology continues to advance, this new technology from OpenRouter not only provides developers with a powerful tool for cost control but also opens up new possibilities for agent application scenarios.

sentences.zh: 在多轮对话中，座席常常需要重复发送相同的系统提示、工具定义和策略指令。

sentences.zh: 即使用户在六轮会话期间仅更改一次输入，这也会导致重复收费。

sentences.zh: 通过提示缓存，OpenRouter 可以从缓存中读取，以避免重复提示的高成本。

sentences.en: Depending on the service provider, the cost of cache reads is 0.1 to 0.5 times the normal input price, greatly reducing expenses.

sentences.en: On the Claude Sonnet4.6 model, the cache read price is only $0.30 per million tokens, while the normal input price is $3.00.
sentences.zh: 在 Claude Sonnet4.6 模型上，缓存读取价格仅为每百万代币 0.30 美元，而正常输入价格为 3.00 美元。

sentences.en: To ensure this mechanism remains effective in multi-turn conversations, OpenRouter's Sticky Routing technology directs subsequent requests to the same provider that holds the hot cache, allowing developers to continue benefiting from low-cost cache reads across different conversation rounds.
sentences.zh: 为了确保该机制在多轮对话中保持有效，OpenRouter 的粘性路由技术将后续请求定向到保存热缓存的同一提供者，从而使开发人员能够继续从不同对话轮次的低成本缓存读取中受益。

Additionally, developers can easily check whether the cache is working by reviewing the usage data in the request response.

sentences.zh: 然而，为了充分利用这项创新技术，开发人员必须确保在整个过程中保持相同的会话。

sentences.en: For cache effectiveness, OpenRouter recommends users set a session_id, which can immediately enable Sticky Routing after the first successful request, not just after a cache hit.
sentences.zh: 为了缓存有效性，OpenRouter建议用户设置一个session_id，它可以在第一次成功请求后立即启用粘性路由，而不仅仅是在缓存命中后。

sentences.en: Additionally, developers can easily check whether the cache is working by reviewing the usage data in the request response.
sentences.zh: 此外，开发人员可以通过查看请求响应中的使用数据来轻松检查缓存是否正常工作。

blocks.html_en: As AI technology continues to advance, this new technology from OpenRouter not only provides developers with a powerful tool for cost control but also opens up new possibilities for agent application scenarios.

sentences.en: As AI technology continues to advance, this new technology from OpenRouter not only provides developers with a powerful tool for cost control but also opens up new possibilities for agent application scenarios.
sentences.zh: 随着AI技术的不断进步，OpenRouter的这项新技术不仅为开发者提供了成本控制的有力工具，也为代理应用场景开辟了新的可能性。

content_html_zh:
随着人工智能对话技术的不断进步，OpenRouter最近推出了两项创新技术——即时缓存和粘性路由，旨在大幅降低多轮代理对话的令牌成本。 这项新技术的推出意味着开发者在与代理进行长期交互时可以享受更低的成本，从而促进代理应用的采用。

在多轮对话中，座席常常需要重复发送相同的系统提示、工具定义和策略指令。 即使用户在六轮会话期间仅更改一次输入，这也会导致重复收费。 通过提示缓存，OpenRouter 可以从缓存中读取，以避免重复提示的高成本。 根据服务提供商的不同，缓存读取的成本是正常输入价格的0.1至0.5倍，大大减少了开支。 在 Claude Sonnet4.6 模型上，缓存读取价格仅为每百万代币 0.30 美元，而正常输入价格为 3.00 美元。

为了确保该机制在多轮对话中保持有效，OpenRouter 的粘性路由技术将后续请求定向到保存热缓存的同一提供者，从而使开发人员能够继续从不同对话轮次的低成本缓存读取中受益。

然而，为了充分利用这项创新技术，开发人员必须确保在整个过程中保持相同的会话。 为了缓存有效性，OpenRouter建议用户设置一个session_id，它可以在第一次成功请求后立即启用粘性路由，而不仅仅是在缓存命中后。 此外，开发人员可以通过查看请求响应中的使用数据来轻松检查缓存是否正常工作。

随着AI技术的不断进步，OpenRouter的这项新技术不仅为开发者提供了成本控制的有力工具，也为代理应用场景开辟了新的可能性。
